title: scrophularia frigida subsp. frigida
intro: Scrophularia frigida subsp. frigida, also known as the Siberian figwort or cold figwort, is a perennial plant species belonging to the figwort family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Scrophularia frigida subsp. frigida include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health concerns.
